markdown:
#  Mark Up a Drawing 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add personal markups to a drawing,_ 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Drawings tool.
    * _To publish markups,_ 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Any markups you add will automatically be added to your Personal layer. In order for markups to be visible to any user with permissions to view drawings on the project, you must [publish your personal markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups) to the Published layer. Users with 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions can publish their personal markups.
    * If you previously added markups to an existing drawing in Procore and then upload a newer revision of that same drawing, all of the markups (except sketches) from the previous revision will be preserved and inherited by the new drawing. You should automatically see all of the same personal and published markups on top of the new revision.


##  Video 
##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Open** next to the drawing you're going to mark up.
  3. Click the **Markup** icon in the upper right of the page.   
_Tip!_ Be sure you are showing your personal layer! Click **Filter** and make sure the Personal layer is visible.  
![Markup In The Drawing Toolbar](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/690eed7f1b889b05c32e8c1fa29218f8/97849b368c8d5070d7b9f4577cc64966/markup-in-the-drawing-toolbar.jpg?fm=webp&h=41)
  4. Mark up the drawing using the tools in the toolbar (detailed below) and using the copy, duplicate, and link features, which are accessible after clicking on the markup.
  5. When you have finalized a markup, and you are ready to make it visible to your team, [Publish the Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups) by clicking on the markup and choosing **Publish** from the menu that appears.  
_Note:_ Not all markups are able to be edited after publishing. If you want to redo a published markup, you will need to [Delete the Markup](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-drawing-markups), and add the markup again.  
![2024 12 13 Publish Markup](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f9e911b296c163a04e14330898a9e28b/fa819b85ce2e50eb12acf8c7d4d5f8b8/2024-12-13-publish-markup.png?fm=webp&h=24)


##  Toolbar 
  * **Select / Multi / Lasso:** Pan around the drawing by clicking and dragging on an image with the **Select** tool. Select multiple markups to publish, edit, resize, or delete using the **Multi Select** or **Lasso** tools.![Drawings Toolbar Select](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4ca95638909f650946cf323a6e68ebc3/228ea1cab4eff63d4ccc60f532fd23c2/drawings-toolbar-select.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Pen / Highlight:** Draw freehand shapes on the drawing using either **Pen** or **Highlight**. You can change the color and thickness of the line using the Color and Line Width options in the toolbar.  
**_Tip_**! Hold the 'Shift' button on your keyboard if you want to draw a straight line.  
![Drawings Toolbar Pen](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb06158586e0375b211868a6130d4149/b18dd7de9e10e46a685e9e792b05d69c/drawings-toolbar-pen.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Cloud / Box / Ellipse** **:** Draw a shape to highlight an area or link an item to. See [Link Related Items on a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/link-items-on-a-drawing). You can change the color, thickness, and opacity of a shape from the Color, Line Width, and Fill options in the toolbar.  
![Drawings Toolbar Shape](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d972f8d1273d7120671314e8ce1d05b1/a893022555dc492581367d03f74e2d1b/drawings-toolbar-shape.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Arrow / Line / Double Arrow:** Draw a line or an arrow to point to an area or link an item to. You can change the color and thickness of the line or arrow from the Color and Line Width options in the toolbar. See [Link Related Items on a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/link-items-on-a-drawing).   
![Drawings Toolbar Line](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/502f5d9765400c04e360739aab34fbe1/d26972ed34ba8dc892d63e2f5b51c90a/drawings-toolbar-line.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Text:** Add a text box to add information or comments. Click inside the box to begin typing. You can adjust the font size by selecting a size number from the drop-down menu, or change the color from the Color option in the toolbar. Click and drag the corners of the text box if you want to adjust the size of the box.   
![Drawings Toolbar Text](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fad19cffbbd0af5df8315680624d7836/afd430526cdfb2987c94f0e0090004b5/drawings-toolbar-text.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Distance / Area / Freehand / Calibrate:** After adding a calibration to your drawing using the **Calibration** tool, use the other measuring tools to measure a distance, area, or curved or poly shape. See [Add Measurements to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-measurements-to-a-drawing).  
![Drawings Toolbar Measurements](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5b1516d535fcae1d1ee642db65f86672/75de7d97df2cc233c0491797445996eb/drawings-toolbar-measurements.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Drawing:** Add a square or circle to add a link to another drawing sheet to.   
**_Tip_** _!_ To draw a circle over the desired area, start at the upper-left corner where the edges of the left and top sides of the circle would meet. Hold the Shift key (to create a symmetrical circle), left-click and drag to the bottom right of the circle, and release the left-click.  
![Drawings Toolbar Drawing](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9a7c0168e6d4df1a61ac5ac78ab41e47/ca96f95ab7ef0c7f8f92289f0bf6c840/drawings-toolbar-drawing.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Pins:** Click to select different pin markups to link items to specific areas of the drawing.  
_Note:_ You will only see pin markup options for the tools that are currently enabled in the project. For example, if your organization does not use the Coordination Issues tool, you will not see the 'Issue' pin in the markup toolbar.  
![Drawings Toolbar Pin](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b85e3462c6b070d43f981e592f7dd3ea/561f081bd6aac4bebef6684780b608f0/drawings-toolbar-pin.png?fm=webp&h=20)
    * Click the **Photos** pin to link a photo to an area of the drawing. See [Add Photos to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-photos-to-a-drawing).  
![Drawings Toolbar Photos](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d6010bd91e96abc239967a0ee1aaf4e6/63f1be22a8b1ca5b85e8d538a53d3ac0/drawings-toolbar-photos.png?fm=webp&h=45)
    * Click the **Punch** pin to link a punch item to an area of the drawing. See [Add Punch List Items to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-punch-list-items-to-a-drawing).  
![Drawings Toolbar Punch](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fd25431989a970099d943ad26bad5892/ba7c0dc7db6292cdf4cf5d0c21cfbee4/drawings-toolbar-punch.png?fm=webp&h=45)
    * Click the **Issue** pin to link a coordination issue to an area of the drawing. See [Add Coordination Issues to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/create-or-link-coordination-issues-on-a-drawing).  
![Drawings Toolbar Coordination Issues](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4f976e76014d1e97ec71fb560a16f027/679d0bf2d791c64b7af5b6b768d2a8dd/drawings-toolbar-coordination-issues.png?fm=webp&h=45)
    * Click the **Obs** pin to link an observation to an area of the drawing. See [Add Observations to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing).  
![Drawings Toolbar Observation](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ae00f764209d7a28e9afde66d5ce2ff5/7efea782ead7e97060b321ccf29c5405/drawings-toolbar-observation.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Color:** This additional tool will appear when you select a drawing markup tool that allows you to modify the color. Select which color to use on a markup from this menu.  
![Drawings Toolbar Color](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f354565313b92550c3d5aa66c43bb525/51f23a5b57de45f838eee19c67c0f0ac/drawings-toolbar-color.png?fm=webp&h=40)
  * **Fill:** This additional tool will appear when you select a drawing markup tool that allows you to modify the fill. Select the desired fill transparency of a markup.  
![Drawings Toolbar Fill](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/de82807e31fd057cbf8c179212036ec3/e7556c2efc28bfbae7af5dcff59906d5/drawings-toolbar-fill.png?fm=webp&h=45)
  * **Line Width:** This additional tool will appear when you select a drawing markup tool that allows you to modify the width. Specify the width of a single line or border of a shape.  
![Drawings Toolbar Line Width](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7bf8a88b7b02dc1686878410fbe4eb16/c444e76a82e2a53b1a1f959c79dd0a88/drawings-toolbar-line-width.png?fm=webp&h=45)


##  Next Steps 
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups)


## See Also

  * [Mark Drawings as Obsolete](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/mark-drawings-as-obsolete)

title: Mark Up a Drawing
description: How to use the Drawings markup toolbar to mark up a drawing in your project.
